import sys
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.runtime.external_receipt_intake import intake

positive = json.loads(Path('governance/tests/fixtures/telegram_receipt_contract_positive.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
negative = json.loads(Path('governance/tests/fixtures/telegram_receipt_contract_negative_release_claim.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
pos = intake('production_telegram', positive, write=False)
neg = intake('production_telegram', negative, write=False)
record = {'ok': pos.get('ok') is True and neg.get('ok') is False, 'release_pass': False, 'positive': pos, 'negative': neg}
print(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
raise SystemExit(0 if record['ok'] else 1)
